knowledge_points.name: 性格与外貌特征词汇
knowledge_points.description: 掌握old, young, funny, kind, strict, polite, hard-working, clever, quiet等形容词的音形义

knowledge_points.name: 询问人物特征的特殊疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 运用Who's your...teacher?和What's he/she like?询问身份与性格特征

knowledge_points.name: 确认特征的一般疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 掌握Is he/she...?引导的一般疑问句及其肯定与否定回答

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母y在词尾的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握字母y在单词末尾发/i/的规律，如baby, happy, sunny

knowledge_points.name: 星期与课程安排词汇
knowledge_points.description: 掌握Monday至Sunday以及各学科名词的拼写与用法

knowledge_points.name: 询问及描述课程安排
knowledge_points.description: 运用What do you have on Mondays? I have...进行日常交流

knowledge_points.name: 频度副词often的用法
knowledge_points.description: 掌握often在句子中的位置，描述周末经常进行的活动

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母组合ee和ea的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握ee和ea在重读音节中发/i:/的规律，如feet, tea, read

knowledge_points.name: 饮食名词与味道形容词
knowledge_points.description: 掌握常见食物词汇及fresh, healthy, delicious, sweet, hot等描述词

knowledge_points.name: 表达饮食意愿与偏好
knowledge_points.description: 运用What would you like to eat?和What's your favourite food?进行点餐或交流

knowledge_points.name: 名词复数的变化规则
knowledge_points.description: 掌握名词复数加-s和-es的拼写规则，如sandwiches, potatoes

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母组合ow的发音规律
knowledge_points.description: 辨析ow在单词中的两种发音：/aʊ/ (cow) 和 /əʊ/ (snow)

knowledge_points.name: 个人能力动词短语
knowledge_points.description: 掌握sing English songs, do kung fu, play the pipa等动词短语

knowledge_points.name: 情态动词can的肯否定用法
knowledge_points.description: 掌握I can...和I can't...描述能力的表达，并使用but连接转折

knowledge_points.name: 乐器与球类运动的冠词规则
knowledge_points.description: 辨析play the + 乐器与play + 球类（不加the）的用法差异

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母组合oo的发音辨析
knowledge_points.description: 辨析oo发长音/u:/与短音/ʊ/的规律，如cool vs book

knowledge_points.name: 家居用品词汇与方位介词
knowledge_points.description: 掌握clock, photo, water bottle等词及beside, in front of等方位词

knowledge_points.name: There be 句型的单复数运用
knowledge_points.description: 运用There is...与There are...描述某处存在某物

knowledge_points.name: 空间位置的综合描述
knowledge_points.description: 结合There be句型与方位介词描述房间布局

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母组合ai和ay的发音
knowledge_points.description: 掌握ai和ay在单词中发/eɪ/的规律，如rainy, Monday, wait

knowledge_points.name: 自然景观类词汇
knowledge_points.description: 掌握forest, lake, mountain, hill, river, village等自然地理名词

knowledge_points.name: There be 句型的一般疑问句
knowledge_points.description: 掌握Is there a...?与Are there any...?及其简略回答

knowledge_points.name: 限定词any在疑问句中的用法
knowledge_points.description: 理解并掌握any在复数名词前的疑问用法，与some进行区分

knowledge_points.name: 语音：字母组合ou的发音规律
knowledge_points.description: 掌握ou在单词中发/aʊ/的规律，如house, mouse, sound
